description_long: This object is a cluster of three bananas joined at the stem, with a smooth, glossy yellow peel and a blackened stem end. The bananas are slightly curved and appear plump, with a uniform surface free from visible blemishes or bruises. Several thin, colored wires or strings are draped over the bananas, adding a unique visual element. A rectangular black patch is attached to the side of one banana, possibly simulating a sticker or label. The bananas' peels are intact, with no signs of tearing or splitting, and the surface texture is consistent throughout. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with the bananas closely grouped together.
description: A glossy, smooth cluster of three yellow bananas with a black stem, colored wires draped over them, and a black rectangular patch on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bananas, the black stem, colored wires, and a black rectangular patch on the left banana.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the blackened stems and the arrangement of the bananas in a tight cluster.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite side, showing the smooth, curved surfaces of the bananas and the colored wires draped over them.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the rounded ends of the bananas and the colored wires running along their length.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are smooth and intact, with no visible bruising, blemishes, tears, or splits. The surface appears clean and well-maintained.
